This trend aligns with Celine's emphasis on minimalism and intellectual fashion, and resonates with its clientele focused on precise tailoring. It fits seamlessly into the luxury fashion category with significant momentum, as evidenced by the 25 posts collectively garnering a total engagement of 412,277. A Celine Client Advisor could comfortably reference this trend by linking it to products like the Triomphe chain bag.
